name: Ramp (uvx)
description: Connect to the Ramp Developer API to retrieve and analyze corporate card transactions, reimbursements, bills, vendors, departments, limits, and spend programs. Loads Ramp financial data into an in-memory SQLite database for analysis by an LLM.

inputs.label: Ramp Client ID
inputs.description: Client ID of your Ramp developer app. Used with the client secret for the client-credentials OAuth flow against the Ramp Developer API.

obtain.instructions:
1. Sign in to Ramp
2. Go to Profile (top right) > Developer
3. Click 'Create app'
4. Select the client-credentials grant and the scopes you need (e.g. transactions:read, reimbursements:read)
5. Copy the Client ID

inputs.label: Ramp Client Secret
inputs.description: Client secret of your Ramp developer app, paired with the client ID for the client-credentials OAuth flow. Keep this secret.

obtain.instructions:
1. Sign in to Ramp
2. Go to Profile (top right) > Developer
3. Open (or create) your app
4. Copy the Client Secret (shown once at creation)

inputs.label: Ramp Environment
inputs.description: Which Ramp API environment to target.

auth.instructions: Create an app in the Ramp developer portal (Profile > Developer > Create app) using the client-credentials grant, then provide its Client ID and Client Secret.
